Video.summary: Roddy McDowell plays a filmmaker in an operating room, and meets Carol. Also: a shift with Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: The hilarious spoof "Went With The Wind!" is presented for your entertainment. Dinah Shore guest stars.
Video.title: Dinah Shore

Video.summary: The one-of-a-kind Dom DeLuise and the sultry Peggy Lee are Carol's guests for a night of sketches and songs.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Peggy Lee, Dom Deluise

Video.summary: Jim Nabors appears as Carol's season opening guest! Jim plays a neighbor visiting a single woman.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Roddy McDowell stars. Includes Harvey's proposal, Roddy & Carol working, and a spoof of "The Little Foxes."
Video.title: Roddy McDowell

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball is in hot water with his wife. Then, a nervous woman finds her spouse pushing her buttons.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Garry Moore and Durward Kirby appear in "Science Fiction Playhouse." "Carol & Sis" features Carol intoxicated.
Video.title: Garry Moore, Durward Kirby

Video.summary: Andy Griffith guests, retelling a familiar Aesop fable in his own inimitable fashion.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Andy Griffith

Video.summary: Guest Glen Campbell appears in a sketch spoofing "A Star Is Born." Also, Tim is a guinea pig for a cure.
Video.title: Glen Campbell

Video.summary: You get two Carols for the price of one when Carol Channing guests!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Carol Channing

Video.summary: Jack Klugman sings with Carol, while Tony takes part in a sketch as part of a tribute to Broadway.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jack Klugman, Tony Randall

Video.summary: Carol's series premiere guest is Jim Nabors. Plus "V.I.P." interview with Shirley Dimple.
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Comedian Scoey Mitchell and singer Bobbie Gentry are Carol's guests for "The Queen Elizabeth Show."
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Scoey Mitchell, Bobbie Gentry

Video.summary: Joel Grey and Vincent Price play guests at a hotel where Carol is the switchboard operator.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Joel Grey, Vincent Price

Video.summary: Steve Lawrence guests! Includes Mr. Tudball attempting to explain the new intercom to secretary Mrs. Wiggins.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Cass Elliot & Tim Conway star! Cass & Carol browse literature, and Tim is an odd substitute in "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway, Cass Elliot

Video.summary: Betty White joins in the latest installment of "The Family" wherein Mama has decided to clean up her attic.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Betty White

Video.summary: Join Carol, Harvey, Vicki, and Tim as they spoof a classic Joan Crawford film in the sketch "Mildred Fierce."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Hal Linden takes a leave from the 12th Precinct to cut it up with Carol & company!
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Hal Linden

Video.summary: Eunice gets her big break on "The Gong Show!" Also: An interview with the wife of a kidnap victim.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Tim Conway contributes in sketches as the Lone Ranger and as a man who lives a dog's life.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Image.alt: Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman
Pat Carroll, Tim Conway, Karen Wyman

Video.summary: Ruth Buzzi & Jack Gilford star in "Snow White- 15 Years Later." An accident causes problems on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Ruth Buzzi, Jack Gilford

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Mel Torme spoof the classic comedy "Some Like It Hot" with a gender-flipping twist.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Mel Torme

Video.summary: Mama, Eunice, and Ed return from an inspiring Sunday sermon.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Jim Nabors

Video.summary: Tonight, Tim and Carol spar over a late-night phone call.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best Of The Carol Burnett Show
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Anthony Newley & Dick Martin appear in a tribute to movie detectives, and Carol & Vicki are ready to mingle.
Video.title: Anthony Newley, Dick Martin

Video.summary: Tim Conway returns! Tim plays a lion, then teams with Harvey as a pair of military aircraft spotters.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Tim Conway guest stars. Tim's engagement ring for Carol causes bad luck. Also featured: "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest Ken Berry takes part in a series of sketches highlighted by his role as a lawyer facing off with Tim.
Video.title: Ken Berry

Video.summary: Carol salutes MGM with the help of guest stars Chita Rivera and Bob Newhart. Spoofs of classic movies abound.
Video.title: Chita Rivera, Bob Newhart

Video.summary: Guest Tim Conway appears in a sketch where two policemen go undercover. Also: a poker game on "Carol & Sis."
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest star Tim Conway steals the show as a bank robber, and as a conventioneer double booked in a hotel room.
Video.title: Tim Conway

Video.summary: Ken Berry and Shirley Jones star. Carol is under a spell and Shirley joins "As The Stomach Turns."
Video.title: Shirley Jones, Ken Berry

Video.summary: Lucille Ball and Tim Conway guest star, highlighted by a sketch in which Lucy and Carol are Rent-A-Car agents.
Video.title: Lucille Ball, Tim Conway

Video.summary: Guest star Steve Lawrence sings a duet with Dick, while Tim cracks jokes and a case as Danny Draft.
Video.title: Steve Lawrence

Video.summary: Mr. Tudball takes his secretary Mrs. Wiggins to lunch. Also: Harvey & Carol pick up on each other in a bar.
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: The conclusion of the fifth-season "Family Show" finale brings to a close the spoof "The Doily Sisters."
Video.title: Family Show

Video.summary: Guest Andy Griffith appears in "Mr. Law & Order." On "Carol & Sis", Roger leaves Carol a football widow.
Video.title: Andy Griffith
